title: 3v3 Move as a Team SSG
summary: 3v3 SSG with four goals and restriction to promote pressing forward together and recovery transitions.  **Goals only count if entire team is in the attacking half of the field.
setupHtml: Four small goals in each corner of rectangle.  Divide pitch horizontally in half.  Divide group in half to form two teams, and groups of three will perform reps together.
instructionsHtml:
1. Coach passes to one team from center to start play.
2. 3v3 SSG towards the four goals, but goals only count if the whole team is in attacking half.
3. Allow for a few turnovers.  Either coach can restart OOB or they can do simple kick-in restarts.
4. Rotate add’l players at end of play or after a set (e.g. 45 sec) time period.
emphasisHtml: Advance as a unit.  Be aware of your shape before you try to score.  Transition quickly and be ready to recover!

diagram.alt: 3v3 Move as a Team SSG diagram
